message:
fix(daemon): increase shutdown timeout from 1s to 5s (bd-16)

The 1-second daemon shutdown timeout was too aggressive. Daemon sync
operations may involve git commits or database writes that take several
seconds. After the timeout, the daemon was force-killed via process.Kill(),
potentially interrupting in-flight operations. Increase to 5 seconds to
allow graceful completion of pending work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/garnet
